ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the energy consumption record */,
  "electricity_facility" REAL /* Total electricity consumption for the facility (kW) */,
  "fans_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for fans (kW) */,
  "cooling_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for cooling systems (kW) */,
  "heating_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for heating systems (kW) */,
  "interior_lights_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for interior lights (kW) */,
  "interior_equipment_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for interior equipment (kW) */,
  "gas_facility" REAL /* Total gas consumption for the facility (kW) */,
  "heating_gas" REAL /* Gas consumption for heating systems (kW) */,
  "water_heater_gas" REAL /* Gas consumption for water heaters (kW) */,
  "electricity_facility_monthly" REAL /* Total electricity consumption for the facility (kW) on a monthly basis */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Current temperature in the building */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Current humidity in the building */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* External weather conditions */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of people in the building */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the energy consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., office, lab, residential) */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy system (e.g., Fans, Cooling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of energy system (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "system_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the energy system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the system was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_energy_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly summary */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the summary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary */,
  "total_electricity" REAL /* Total electricity consumption (kW) for the month */,
  "total_gas" REAL /* Total gas consumption (kW) for the month */,
  "monthly_cost_electricity" REAL /* Monthly cost of electricity */,
  "monthly_cost_gas" REAL /* Monthly cost of gas */,
  "cost_savings" REAL /* Cost savings compared to the previous month */,
  "sustainability_score" REAL /* Sustainability score for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_energy_summaries_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy consumption record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_consumption_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumption_id") REFERENCES energy_consumption ("consumption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy system */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., repair, inspection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy alert */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy system */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high consumption, system malfunction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  "notified_users" TEXT /* List of users notified about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_alerts_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES energy_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_alerts_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)
